name: Update Cloud Extract Refresh Task — Preview Only (safe)
description: SAFE: exercises update-cloud-extract-refresh-task PREVIEW phase only. With confirm omitted the tool returns the proposed schedule change plus a confirmation token without applying it. Prompt forbids confirming. Requires ADMIN_TOOLS_ENABLED=true, site-admin PAT on Tableau Cloud, and EVAL_EXTRACT_TASK_LUID (a disposable test extract-refresh task).
prompt: Use the Tableau MCP server to first list extract refresh tasks, then PREVIEW updating task {{env.EVAL_EXTRACT_TASK_LUID}} to a new daily schedule. Only run the preview — do NOT confirm or apply. Report the current schedule, the proposed schedule, and whether a confirmation token was returned. Do not re-call with confirm=true.
